title: Quiet Riverside Film Photography AI
sourceTitle: Quiet Riverside Film Photography AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Quiet realistic riverside film photograph of young East Asian woman in a light knit cardigan, dark skirt, and white canvas shoes holding a small bouquet at quiet riverside walkway at the edge of the city with calm water, trees, low buildings, and a canvas bag beside her during late-summer gray-blue dusk with a little warm light. Subject: young East Asian woman in a light knit cardigan, dark skirt, and white canvas shoes holding a small bouquet appears in a natural relaxed candid pose, emotionally calm rather than staged, with clothing texture, skin tone, and small personal object details rendered softly and realistically. Scene: quiet riverside walkway at the edge of the city with calm water, trees, low buildings, and a canvas bag beside her with calm river water, light wind moving leaves, distant low buildings, a few warm window lights, breathable space, and a clean restrained urban-edge atmosphere. Composition: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Signature Elements: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Style: Photorealistic poetic film photography with natural candid realism, subtle late-summer melancholy, clean restrained detail, breathable composition, and gentle analog color grading. Color Palette: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Lighting: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Camera: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Materials: Knit fabric, cotton canvas, small bouquet paper or personal object texture, river surface, tree leaves, low concrete or stone wall, and analog film grain. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

Theme: Quiet realistic riverside film photograph of adult illustrator in a cream shirt holding fresh flowers and sitting on a riverside stone wall at slow neighborhood riverbank with soft tree shadows, still water, and distant apartment lights during early autumn evening just before the lights fully turn on. Subject: adult illustrator in a cream shirt holding fresh flowers and sitting on a riverside stone wall appears in a natural relaxed candid pose, emotionally calm rather than staged, with clothing texture, skin tone, and small personal object details rendered softly and realistically. Scene: slow neighborhood riverbank with soft tree shadows, still water, and distant apartment lights with calm river water, light wind moving leaves, distant low buildings, a few warm window lights, breathable space, and a clean restrained urban-edge atmosphere. Composition: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Signature Elements: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Style: Photorealistic poetic film photography with natural candid realism, subtle late-summer melancholy, clean restrained detail, breathable composition, and gentle analog color grading. Color Palette: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Lighting: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Camera: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Materials: Knit fabric, cotton canvas, small bouquet paper or personal object texture, river surface, tree leaves, low concrete or stone wall, and analog film grain. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.
